imageAlt: Billing Requests: Instant First Payment + Direct Debit mandate creation roadmap item preview image
title: Billing Requests: Instant First Payment + Direct Debit mandate creation
summaryBody: Increase adoption of GC functionality by allowing FreeAgent users connected to GC to request DD Mandate at same time as one-off IBP payment. Thus speeding up the time to get recurring payments set up for recurring payments businesses such as accountants
detailBody: Increase adoption of GC functionality by allowing FreeAgent users connected to GC to request DD Mandate at same time as one-off IBP payment. Thus speeding up the time to get recurring payments set up for recurring payments businesses such as accountants
